ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the project */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was created */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the project */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the package */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier of the project the package belongs to */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the package */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the package was created */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the package */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the package was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type (class) */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type (class) */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier of the package the type belongs to */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the type was created */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the type */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the type was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier of the type (class) the method belongs to */,
  "method_start_line_no" INTEGER /* Starting line number of the method in the source code file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the source code file where the method is found */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the method */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the method was created */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the method */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the method was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "code_quality_issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each code quality issue */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier of the project where the issue is found */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier of the package where the issue is found */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier of the type (class) where the issue is found */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier of the method where the issue is found */,
  "implementation_smell" TEXT /* Type of implementation smell (e.g., Long Statement, Magic Number, Complex Method) */,
  "cause_of_smell" TEXT /* Detailed explanation of the cause of the smell */,
  "method_start_line_no" INTEGER /* Starting line number of the method in the source code file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the source code file where the issue is found */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Commit hash of the version where the issue was identified */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the issue (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the issue (e.g., Open, In Progress, Resolved) */,
  "assigned_to" TEXT /* ID of the user assigned to resolve the issue */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was resolved */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes on how the issue was resolved */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the issue */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was created */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the issue */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Developer, Project Manager, Quality Assurance Engineer) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the user account */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the user account */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the role */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier of the role */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the user-role assignment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user-role assignment was created */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the user-role assignment */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the user-role assignment was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id")
)
